description: VON POLL IMMOBILIEN is a European real estate brokerage company. Its website provides property search, brokerage, valuation, financing, and informational content for buyers, sellers, owners, and investors.
summary: VON POLL IMMOBILIEN exposes a public MCP server at `https://chatgpt-app.von-poll.com/mcp`; no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or CLI documentation was found on `von-poll.com`.
